rows.cycle_goal_summary: Inspect the nearby chest contents and nearby resource/work options, then record any missing prerequisites (e.g., crafting table presence) as memory if not found.
rows.what_happened: Runtime classifier saw verifier=passed, tools=inspect_chest, statuses=inspect_chest:inspected.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Determine whether a reachable placed crafting_table is available within reach from the current area (or recorded from the prior chest inspection). If not available, decide the immediate prerequisite from gathered chest resources: craft/assemble required wood components and prepare to place a crafting table next.
rows.what_happened: Runtime classifier saw verifier=passed, tools=inspect_chest, statuses=inspect_chest:inspected.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Check/record whether a reachable placed crafting_table block is currently available in the chest-checked area; if absent, determine the immediate inventory conversion needed from the inspected chest contents to be ready to place a crafting_table item next.
rows.what_happened: Runtime classifier saw verifier=passed, tools=inspect_chest, statuses=inspect_chest:inspected.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Verify/record placed crafting_table presence (reachable) in the chest-checked area; otherwise compute the immediate conversion chain from the inspected chest contents to a crafting_table item, and note which resource(s) are missing.
rows.what_happened: Runtime classifier saw verifier=passed, tools=inspect_chest, statuses=inspect_chest:inspected.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Verify/record placed crafting_table presence (reachable) in the chest-checked area; otherwise compute the immediate conversion chain from the inspected chest contents to a crafting_table item, and note which resource(s) are missing.
rows.what_happened: Runtime classifier saw verifier=not_applicable, tools=remember, statuses=remember:remembered.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Verify/record placed crafting_table presence (reachable) in the chest-checked area; otherwise compute the immediate conversion chain from the inspected chest contents to a crafting_table item, and note which resource(s) are missing.
rows.what_happened: Runtime classifier saw verifier=passed, tools=inspect_chest, statuses=inspect_chest:inspected.
